query:
-- 为每个产品的第一个批次设置为默认批次
UPDATE product_variants pv
SET isDefault = 1
WHERE pv.id IN (
  SELECT MIN(pv2.id)
  FROM product_variants pv2
  WHERE pv2.productId NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT productId 
    FROM product_variants 
    WHERE isDefault = 1
  )
  GROUP BY pv2.productId
);

-- 为每个产品的第一个批次设置为默认批次
UPDATE product_variants pv
SET isDefault = 1
WHERE pv.id IN (
  SELECT MIN(pv2.id)
  FROM product_variants pv2
  WHERE pv2.productId NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT productId 
    FROM product_variants 
    WHERE isDefault = 1
  )
  GROUP BY pv2.productId
);
